ALL of the following artifacts are surfaced in the transcript: (1) a merged instar PR number for the autonomous scope-accretion completion-discipline fix (the judge refuses 'done' while in-scope artifacts drafted during a session sit unbuilt without operator ratification); (2-6) for EACH of the five U4 specs (pin-persistence, stale-owner-release, breaker-recovery-probe, lease-handback, rope-health-alerts): a review-convergence + approved:true tag AND a merged instar PR number (PRs may be shared across items when they legitimately combine); (7) surfaced evidence both machines run a deployed version containing the merged U4 changes (version/dist probe on Laptop AND Mini); (8) a multi-machine seamless-UX audit document path on disk with a prioritized gap list, covering credentials/projects/working-set sync, lazy loading, LLM-driven background intelligence, and Telegram+Slack parity; (9) a test-as-self scenario matrix path on disk with surfaced results showing at least one message sent as the operator through the Playwright Telegram profile to a TEST topic round-tripping to a reply, and at least one cross-machine topic transfer exercised during the test with seamless continuation; (10) a final report sent to topic 29836. SCOPE-ACCRETION CLAUSE (self-applied): any new in-scope artifact this session itself drafts (a spec, a runbook, a follow-up it deems aligned) must be either completed or explicitly ratified as deferred by the operator in this topic before completion — 'documented stretch' alone does not satisfy completion.
